query:
_sourcecategory="detectionlab/siem/insights" OR _sourcecategory="cse/insights" OR (_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourcecategory=cseinsight insightupdated)
| json field=_raw "severity"
| json field=_raw "closed"
| json field=_raw "closedBy"
| json field=_raw "assignee"
| json field=_raw "resolution"
| where !isNull(closed)
| count by closedBy

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides SOC KPIs related metrics.
